pages.text: I’m currently a Ph.D. student in Electrical and Computer Engineering (ECE) with the SKL-IOTSC and Department of ECE, University of Macau, Macao SAR, China; and also a Research Assistant with the SISSE, Jinan University, Zhuhai, China. I’m co-supervised by Prof. Shaodan Ma (SMIEEE, Associate Director of SKL-IOTSC) and Prof. Guanghua Yang (FIET, SMIEEE, Associate Dean of SISSE). Previously, I obtained my Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical Engineering (EE) from Jinan University, Zhuhai, China and Master of Science in ECE from University of Macau, Macao SAR, China. My research interests include Intelligent Wireless Communications, Spatial-Temporal Data Mining, Natural Language Processing, Generative Artificial Intelligence, and Smart Healthcare. I also collaborate closely with Prof. Xi Yang (Professor, East China Normal University) on Intelligent Wireless Communications. Education [Aug. 2021 - present] Doctor of Philosophy in Electrical and Computer Engineering, University of Macau [Aug. 2018 - Jun. 2021] Master of Science in Electrical and Computer Engineering, University of Macau [Sep. 2014 - Jun. 2018] Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical Engineering, Jinan University Professional Experience [Jul. 2019 - present] Research Assistant, School of Intelligent Systems Science and Engineering, Jinan University Academic Services Journal Referee IEEE Internet of Things Journal IEEE Wireless Communication Letters Computer Methods in Biomechanics and Biomedical Engineering Conference Reviewer IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC) IEEE/CIC International Conference on Communications in China (ICCC) International Conference on Artificial Intelligence of Things and Systems (AIoTSys) Research Interests Artificial Intelligence: Spatial-temporal Data Mining, Natural Language Processing, Generative Artificial Intelligence Intelligent Communications: Channel Estimation, CSI Feedback, Channel Modeling, Massive MIMO Smart Healthcare: Artifical Intelligence and Wireless Communications for Smart Healthcare Honors and Awards [2023] Wining Prize of the First 6G Intelligent Wireless Communication System Competition (Captain, Rank 9/1252 teams) [2022] Silver Prize of the First 6G AI Competition (Captain, Rank 2/727 teams) [2018] The 2nd Prize of the ASC Student Supercomputer Challenge (Captain) [2017] National Encouragement Scholarship [2016] National Encouragement Scholarship [2015] National Encouragement Scholarship

Group Activities | Moments Group Activities [2023-05-22] We won the Champion of the first Badminton Competition held by the SKL-IOTSC! [2023-03-05] A group photo took on 2023-03-05 when we were having a team building activity on Guishan Island, Zhuhai, China ! [2022-09-09] Groupmates expressed thanks to Prof. Shaodan Ma on the day before Teachers Day! Moments [2023-06-10] After nearly 4 years, I feel very excited to visit my alma mater Jinan University (Zhuhai Campus) today! [2023-05-18] Glad to attend the awards ceremony of the First 6G Intelligent Wireless Communication System Competition held by the IMT-2030 (6G) Promotion Group in Shanghai, China. [2023-04-09] Lovely dog and cat! [2023-01-01] Happy New Year 2023! Greetings from Macau! [2022-10-06] Very happy to attend my friend’s wedding ceremony and have a short trip during the National Day Holiday in Chaoshan! 超简单的图片左右切换滑动 var cot=0;//设置一个计数器，初始值为0；作用是用来监听点击切换的时候哪一个图片应该隐藏或者显示 function nex(){ if(cot0){ cot--; $('.imgs img').eq(cot).animate({'margin-left':'0'},500); } } Previous Next
